statement.informal: `cross_track_distance` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (arc_query_distance >= 0.0 ∧ arc_query_distance <= 2.0 * 6.371e6 ∧ earth_radius > 0.0 ∧ earth_radius <= 1.0e8 ∧ bearing_path > -TWO_PI ∧ bearing_path <= TWO_PI ∧ bearing_query > -TWO_PI ∧ bearing_query <= TWO_PI), the function's result satisfies (True). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
statement.formal_lean:
